findings.description: Home tier preview cards had md:translate-y-12 (Tailwind utility for zigzag offset) AND .card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px) }. Transforms overwrite (do not stack), so on hover an offset card jumped from y:48px to y:-3px in 280ms with spring overshoot ease — read as flicker.
findings.suggestedFix: Remove zigzag offset; keep clean 2x2 grid. Soften .card hover transition from --ease-spring (overshoot 1.56) to --ease-soft (no overshoot). Add transform: translateZ(0) to enable GPU layer.

findings.description: Unknown tier slug renders friendly 'not found' UI but HTTP status is 200. Fine for an internal cohort tool, but bad practice for SEO/crawlers.
findings.suggestedFix: Read RouteHandler return contract; either return Response with 404 or set requestInfo.response.status = 404 before render.
findings.deferredReason: Not user-visible to the 7-person cohort. Park for a future iteration.

notes: Adapted from ralph-wiggum-v2 game template — categories scoped to a small marketing/teaching site, not a game.
Hard requirements relaxed: TDD not enforced for CSS-only fixes (no failing-test step for an animation glitch). All other requirements stand.
Verification harness: agent-browser for link audit + screenshot diff, hyperframes inspect for layout, vite build for type/build cleanliness.
Cohort scope is 7 internal users — converge target reduced from 10 to 5 clean iterations.
Iteration 1 audited every internal route (/, /tiers, /tiers/{orient,operate,extend,author}, /tiers/bogus-slug). All 200 OK. All tier-to-tier nav links resolve correctly.
